summary: Comprehensive testing of 10 new staff tools for Founder and Operations portals. All backend APIs (11/11 tests passed). Mobile and desktop UI verified for path-based rendering, hamburger menus, bottom nav, portal switcher, sidebar collapse, and individual tabs.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/admin/announcements creates announcement (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/admin/announcements lists announcements (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/admin/system-health returns health data (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/ops/my-activity returns activity log (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/ops/search?q=test performs search (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/ops/shift-notes creates shift note (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/ops/shift-notes lists notes (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/ops/escalations creates escalation (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/ops/escalations lists escalations (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/admin/knowledge-base creates KB article (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/admin/knowledge-base lists articles (200 OK)
Mobile: Admin hamburger menu shows TOOLS: Announcements, System Health, Escalations, Knowledge Base
Mobile: Ops hamburger menu (admin on /ops) shows TOOLS: My Activity, Quick Search, Escalate, Shift Notes, SOPs
Mobile: Admin tools NOT shown on /ops hamburger menu
Mobile: OTP toggle visible on /admin, NOT on /ops
Mobile: Bottom nav on admin shows TVT, Support, Home, DTS, Verify
Mobile: Bottom nav on ops shows TVT, Support, Home, DTS, Verify (same)
Mobile: Portal switcher opens on logo tap - shows Benefactor, Beneficiary, Founder Portal, Operations Portal
Mobile: Announcements tab renders with 'New Announcement' button
Mobile: System Health tab shows healthy status and Refresh button
Mobile: Escalations tab renders with filter dropdown
Mobile: Knowledge Base tab renders with category filter and 'New Article' button
Desktop: Admin sidebar shows TOOLS: Announcements, System Health, Escalations, Knowledge Base
Desktop: Ops sidebar (admin on /ops) shows TOOLS: My Activity, Quick Search, Escalate, Shift Notes, SOPs
Desktop: Admin tools NOT shown in /ops sidebar
Desktop: Sidebar collapse toggle works - shows icons only when collapsed
Desktop: Portal switcher opens on logo click with all 4 options
seed_data_creation: Test data prefixed with TEST_ for announcements, shift notes, escalations, KB articles
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 10 staff tools are fully implemented and working. Path-based UI rendering verified - admin on /admin sees founder tools, admin on /ops sees operator tools. Mobile hamburger menu and desktop sidebar both respect path-based rendering. Portal switcher accessible via logo tap/click. OTP toggle only on admin portal. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_staff_tools_mobile.py.
